summary: In this episode of FX Moment, Bloomberg Intelligence Chief FX Strategist Audrey Childe-Freeman and Jordan Rochester, head of FICC strategy for EMEA at Mizuho Bank, discuss how the evolving UK political dynamics leave sterling exposed in the near term via the potential revival of a negative fiscal premium. Jordan and Audrey also revisit the dollar-yen outlook following the recent Ministry of Finance/Bank of Japan FX intervention and discuss what scenarios could take the pair out of the 155.00-160

title_cn: Anthropic 利用新的人工智能工具进军法律行业
summary: Anthropic PBC is taking steps to help legal professionals carry out more tasks using its Claude chatbot, months after the startup helped spark a steep selloff in software stocks by quietly introducing a narrower set of features.Anthropic on Tuesday announced a dozen new tools, or plugins, intended for attorneys, law students and others in the legal sector. One feature, called “commercial counsel,” is meant to take on work like reviewing vendor agreements; another tool is intended to help with st

title: Venture Global Shares Surge on LNG Deals, Project Expansions
title_cn: Venture Global 股价因液化天然气交易和项目扩张而飙升
summary: Venture Global Inc. shares shot up on Tuesday after the liquefied natural gas exporter announced two new supply deals and detailed expansion plans for export projects in Louisiana.

title: Trump's Goal In China? Keep It Simple
title_cn: 特朗普在中国的目标是什么？保持简单
summary: Expectations are running high for the US-China summit in Beijing, but Trump’s main goal should be to not make things worse, the Editorial Board writes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Meat Left Out of EU Suppliers List in Risk to Trade
title_cn: 巴西肉类因贸易风险而被排除在欧盟供应商名单之外
summary: Brazil is absent from a list of countries authorized to supply animal products to the European Union, presenting a trade risk to the world’s largest beef and chicken exporter.

title: Japan’s Sojitz Eyes Southeast Asia for New Rare Earths Supply
title_cn: 日本双日着眼于东南亚寻找新的稀土供应
summary: Japanese trading house Sojitz Corp. is looking to Southeast Asia and other regions as new potential sources of rare earths outside Australia, as it aims to boost output and diversify its supply chain of the highly sought-after materials.

title: China’s Manufacturing Heartland Tested by Iran War Energy Shock
title_cn: 中国制造业腹地经受伊朗战争能源冲击考验
summary: Economic activity in China’s most important manufacturing hub is heaping pressure on power supplies, sparking an energy stress test as the Iran war chokes shipments of fuel.

title: Gold Slides Lower as US Inflation Clouds Fed Easing Outlook
title_cn: 由于美国通胀给美联储宽松前景蒙上阴影，金价下跌
summary: Gold fell as the latest US economic data showed inflation accelerated on rising energy and food prices, reducing odds of monetary easing by the Federal Reserve this year.

title: CommScope Sued by Lenders for at Least $150 Million Over Alleged Breach
title_cn: 康普因涉嫌违规被贷方起诉至少 1.5 亿美元
summary: CommScope Holding Co. was sued by a group of lenders who allege the telecommunications provider breached a debt agreement by failing to pay a prescribed premium of at least $150 million following a key asset sale.

title: Emerging-Market Currencies, Stocks Fall as Iran Truce Hopes Dim
title_cn: 由于伊朗停战希望渺茫，新兴市场货币和股市下跌
summary: Emerging-market currencies and stocks fell Tuesday on concern the ceasefire between the US and Iran is on the brink of collapse, while a slump in South Korean shares also weighed on sentiment.

title: S&P 500 & NASDAQ Fall as Oil Jumps | Closing Bell
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，标普 500 指数和纳斯达克指数下跌 |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Debt, Inflation, Politics: UK Bonds Are Taking a Triple Hit
title_cn: 债务、通胀、政治：英国债券遭受三重打击
summary: As UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer slowly loses allies in government and fights for his survival, the escalating political drama is heaping fresh pressure onto a bond market already battered by the country’s deep-rooted fiscal and economic problems.

title: Bond Bears Reload Fed Rate Hike Wagers on Stubborn Inflation
title_cn: 债券空头因通胀顽固而重新押注美联储加息
summary: Traders have renewed bearish bets on US Treasuries, lifting expectations that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates as oil prices and inflation push higher.

title: Trump Says US Inflation Is 'Short Term'
title_cn: 特朗普称美国通胀是“短期的”
summary: President Donald Trump says inflation in the US is only "short term." He spoke before leaving for Beijing on Tuesday. US inflation accelerated in April due to rising gasoline and grocery costs, exceeding wage growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Fall as Rising Oil Prices Herald Sticky Inflation
title_cn: 油价上涨预示着粘性通胀，国债下跌
summary: Treasuries fell as rising oil prices threatened to keep inflation at levels that could prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates next year.

title: Kalshi Judge Predicts Tribe Will Win Block on Sports Wagers
title_cn: 卡尔什法官预测部落将赢得体育投注
summary: A tribal nation is likely to succeed in blocking Kalshi from offering sports contracts on its land, a federal judge said in what appears to be the first ruling of its kind against the prediction market operator.

title: Chip Stocks Sink as Inflation Woes Boost US Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 通胀困境提振美国收益率，芯片股下跌：市场休整
summary: A selloff in high-flying chipmakers drove stocks lower, with the market also falling alongside bonds after inflation data showed the impacts of energy disruptions stemming from the war in Iran.

title: Vietnam Urges US Navy to Let Oil Tanker Through Its Blockade
title_cn: 越南敦促美国海军允许油轮通过封锁
summary: Vietnam’s state oil company urged the US to let a supertanker pass through an American naval blockade outside of the Persian Gulf, saying the shipment is critical to the Asian country’s economy.

title: Family Offices Build Stake in Niche Miner After Stock Soars 900%
title_cn: 股票飙升 900% 后家族办公室增持利基矿业公司股份
summary: For decades, the risky world of early-stage mining ventures was the playground of institutional funds and commodity trading houses. But after a more than 900% rally in a little-known Canadian potash developer last year, a new class of investors is moving in: family offices.

title: Copper Rallies Above $14,000 a Ton, Nearing Fresh All-Time High
title_cn: 铜价升至每吨 14,000 美元上方，接近历史新高
summary: Copper jumped above $14,000 a ton, closing in on a record high as a rebound in Chinese demand and mounting supply risks outweigh concerns about the Iran war’s impact on global growth.

title: Small Businesses Say Hiring Is Still Brutal
title_cn: 小企业称招聘仍然残酷
summary: No letup on inflation or labor.

title: Boeing Bets Comeback on Trump, China and an Elusive New Plane
title_cn: 波音公司将卷土重来押注于特朗普、中国和一款难以捉摸的新飞机
summary: China is considering a deal for about 500 of the 737 Max jets, which would give China's airlines badly needed planes and provide a trade win for President Donald Trump. Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg is expected to join the US delegation to China and has hinted at a major deal, saying Trump's visit would be "a meaningful opportunity for us." Boeing is starting to lay the groundwork for a successor to the 737 Max, with initial design preferences pointing to a single-aisle airliner that's more evolutionary than groundbreaking, and a formal launch expected around the turn of the decade. Bloomberg's Siddharth Philip joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Extends Gain as US-Iran Ceasefire Remains Elusive
title_cn: 美伊停火仍遥遥无期，油价扩大涨幅
summary: Oil pushed higher as a peace deal between the US and Iran remains elusive, prolonging the effective closure of the vital Strait of Hormuz and the disruption to global energy shipments.

title: US Soy Growers Want China Commitments as Season Slips Away
title_cn: 随着季节的流逝，美国大豆种植者希望中国做出承诺
summary: As US President Donald Trump travels to Beijing for a summit this week with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, American soybean farmers are in a now-familiar spot: Fields are getting planted when demand from their biggest customer is uncertain.

title: US Power Prices Climb 61% Faster Than Inflation as Demand Surges
title_cn: 随着需求激增，美国电价上涨速度比通货膨胀快 61%
summary: Consumer prices climbed last month by the most in three years, but prices for electricity surged even more, highlighting an intensifying battle between utilities, consumers and power grids.

title: US LNG Pioneer Charif Souki Vows He Will Never Go Public Again
title_cn: 美国液化天然气先驱 Charif Souki 发誓再也不会上市
summary: Natural gas entrepreneur Charif Souki’s latest venture will remain closely held after his previous two companies pursued public offerings.

title: India Books Phosphate Fertilizer at 40% Above Pre-War Prices
title_cn: 印度磷肥订购价格较战前价格高出 40%
summary: India, the world’s top buyer of diammonium phosphate, has contracted the crop nutrient at prices almost 40% higher than pre-war levels as the Middle East conflict disrupts supplies and pushes global benchmarks higher.

title: France’s Economy Is Succumbing to Iran War Shock, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示法国经济正在遭受伊朗战争冲击
summary: France’s economy is showing signs of faltering as the fallout from the Middle East conflict hits growth and ratchets up inflation pressure, according to the central bank’s monthly survey of companies.

title: Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Shipments Show First Prolonged Halt Since Start of War
title_cn: 伊朗哈格岛石油运输自战争开始以来首次出现长期停滞
summary: Oil shipments from Iran’s main export terminal appear to have come to a standstill over the past several days, according to satellite images, the first sign of a prolonged halt since the start of the war.

title: Providence Equity Considers Acquisition of Gamma Communications
title_cn: Providence Equity 考虑收购 Gamma Communications
summary: Providence Equity Partners is among suitors exploring an acquisition of Gamma Communications Plc, the London-listed telecommunication services company, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: ECB Rate Hikes Increasingly Likely, Nagel Tells Handelsblatt
title_cn: 内格尔告诉商报，欧洲央行加息的可能性越来越大
summary: The probability that the European Central Bank will need to raise borrowing costs due to the Iran war is rising, according to Bundesbank President Joachim Nagel.

title: Junk-Rated Firms Rush to Reprice Risky Debt as Demand Surges
title_cn: 随着需求激增，垃圾级公司纷纷对风险债务重新定价
summary: Junk-rated firms are rushing to reprice and refinance debt, seizing on renewed investor appetite for riskier US dollar-denominated loans to slash borrowing costs.

title: Altman Testifies About ‘Hair-Raising’ OpenAI Chat With Musk
title_cn: Altman 就 OpenAI 与 Musk 的“令人毛骨悚然”的对话作证
summary: OpenAI’s Sam Altman testified that he was “extremely uncomfortable” with Elon Musk’s insistence that he have complete control over a proposed for-profit subsidiary of the startup back in 2017.

title: Anthropic Warns Investors to Avoid Certain Secondary Market Sellers
title_cn: Anthropic 警告投资者避开某些二级市场卖家
summary: Anthropic PBC identified a number of secondary marketplaces as unauthorized sellers of the company’s shares, telling investors that buying the stock won’t work.

title: Most-Shorted US Stocks Led the Rally, S3's Sloan Says
title_cn: S3 的斯隆表示，做空最多的美国股票领涨
summary: "Risk is on and at higher levels," Bob Sloan, managing partner at S3 Partners, says when discusses short covering in US stocks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia CEO Pay Package Shrinks 27% on Smaller Stock Awards
title_cn: 因股票奖励减少，Nvidia CEO 薪酬缩减 27%
summary: The total pay package for Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang decreased 27% to $36.3 million in fiscal 2026 after the value of his stock awards declined.

title: Anthropic In Talks to Raise $30 Billion at $900 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Anthropic 正在洽谈融资 300 亿美元，估值达 9000 亿美元
summary: Anthropic PBC is in early talks with investors to raise at least $30 billion in fresh financing, according to people familiar with the matter, setting the stage for what could be its largest funding round yet.

title: ServiceNow US Bond Sale Draws $38 Billion of Investor Demand
title_cn: ServiceNow 美国债券发售吸引了 380 亿美元的投资者需求
summary: ServiceNow Inc.’s first US dollar bond sale since 2020 attracted demand nearly 10 times the deal’s size, defying concerns about the software firm’s vulnerability to artificial intelligence disruption.

title: AI Dividend Proposal Roils Korean Market | Bloomberg Tech 5/12/2026
title_cn: 人工智能股息提案搅动韩国市场 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 12 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss comments by a South Korean policymaker that the country should pay citizens a “dividend” using taxes on AI profits. Plus, the largest US derivatives exchange, CME, is planning to create a futures market for computing power, one of the key drivers of the AI boom. And, the CEO of SAP talks about the company’s push into AI agents across business operations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Sink on Hottest Inflation Reading in Years, Jump in Oil
title_cn: 股市因多年来最热门的通胀数据而下跌，石油价格上涨
summary: Traders pulled back from risk assets, with a torrid run in US equities hitting a wall as April inflation data came in hotter than economists’ estimates and worsening tensions between Washington and Iran sent oil prices higher.

title: Chip Stocks Drag Market Lower in Worrying Sign for Momentum Bet
title_cn: 芯片股拖累市场走低，势头押注令人担忧
summary: High-flying chip stocks struggled through one of their most challenging sessions of the year on Tuesday in a dramatic reversal for some of the market’s best performers.

title: eToro Earnings Beats Expectations
title_cn: eToro 盈利超出预期
summary: Yoni Assia, eToro CEO join Bloomberg Businessweek Daily on their reccent earnings beat. EToro Group reported adjusted earnings per share for the first quarter that beat the average analyst estimate. He also discusses retail trade sentiment,  crypto and how AI is changing the trading landscape.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Contrarian 5% Bet on 10-Year Treasuries Is Gaining Credibility
title_cn: 10 年期国债的 5% 逆向押注正在赢得可信度
summary: As US Treasury traders debate whether the 30-year yield will mount a sustained push past 5%, one market veteran is pushing a far bolder wager.

title: Senate Crypto Bill Under Discussion, Use of Stablecoins For Payments. | Bloomberg Crypto 5/12/2026
title_cn: 参议院正在讨论加密货币法案，使用稳定币进行支付。 |彭博加密货币 2026 年 5 月 12 日
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Coinbase Vice President of US Policy Kara Calvert, WalletConnect CEO Jess Houlgrave, Elliptic CEO Simone Maini, Societe Generale-Forge CEO Jean-Marc Stenger, and VARA Head of Market Assurance Sean McHugh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Plans Customizable Camera for Pros, Siri Design Changes in iOS 27
title_cn: 苹果计划为专业人士定制相机，iOS 27 中 Siri 设计发生变化
summary: Apple Inc. is planning to upgrade its Camera app, making the software fully customizable as part of a broader set of user interface changes coming in its next iPhone software update.

title: Samsung’s Labor Talks Fail, Yonhap Says, as Strike Looms
title_cn: 韩联社称三星劳资谈判失败，罢工迫在眉睫
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. and its labor union failed to reach a last-minute wage agreement, according to the Yonhap news service, heightening the risk of a strike that could disrupt operations at the world’s largest memory-chip maker.

title: JPMorgan’s Crypto Push Deepens With Filing for Tokenized Fund
title_cn: 摩根大通通过申请代币化基金深化加密货币发展
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s asset management arm is deepening its push into blockchain-based finance with plans to launch its second tokenized money market fund.

title: CME Plans Computing Power Futures Market
title_cn: CME计划推出算力期货市场
summary: US derivatives exchange CME Group and index provider Silicon Data are teaming up to create a futures market for computing power. Bloomberg’s Katherine Doherty discusses the reasons for the new market and how it will work. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kalshi's $22B Valuation, DraftKings' Prediction Push
title_cn: Kalshi 的 $22B 估值，DraftKings 的预测推动
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle and Chris Palmeri join Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Kalshi has completed a funding round that values the prediction markets platform at $22 billion. DraftKings said it would spend more on a new push into predictions markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Petrobras Completes First Phase of $470 Million Data Center Plan
title_cn: Petrobras 完成第一阶段 4.7 亿美元的数据中心计划
summary: Elea Data Centers has completed the first phase of a 2.3 billion reais ($470 million) project for Brazilian state-controlled oil producer Petrobras, as cloud computing expands in Latin America’s largest economy.

title: Crypto Acceptance Becoming Easier: WalletConnect CEO
title_cn: WalletConnect 首席执行官：加密货币接受变得更容易
summary: Jess Houlgrave, CEO of WalletConnect, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SocGen Takes USD Stablecoin to Millions of Crypto Wallet Users
title_cn: 法国兴业银行向数百万加密钱包用户提供美元稳定币
summary: Jean-Marc Stenger, CEO of Societe Generale-FORGE, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Societe Generale is expanding the reach of its dollar-denominated stablecoin in one of the biggest efforts yet by a major bank to bring digital money to a wider audience. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A-Star: Small Bets Still Crucial for VC-Style Returns
title_cn: A-Star：小额投资对于风险投资式回报仍然至关重要
summary: A-Star co-founder and General Partner Bennett Siegel says the firm is able to make outsized returns because of its commitment to writing smaller checks to a limited group of early-stage startups. A-Star raised $450 million, which may be dwarfed by the latest fund from larger competitors, but Siegel says his firm is sticking to its strategy. He speaks to Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google in Talks to Use SpaceX to Launch Space Data Centers, Report Says
title_cn: 报道称，谷歌正在洽谈使用 SpaceX 发射太空数据中心
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is in talks with Elon Musk’s SpaceX to launch the search company’s test products for orbital data centers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Dubai Positioned Well For Crypto: McHugh
title_cn: 麦克休：迪拜在加密货币方面处于有利地位
summary: Sean McHugh, head of market assurance at VARA, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." VARA, Virtual Assets Regulatory Authority, is responsible for regulating, supervising, and overseeing virtual assets and related activities across all commercial zones in the Emirate of Dubai, excluding the Dubai International Financial Centre. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Unveils Automation Suite Amid Software Market Doubts
title_cn: SAP 在软件市场疑虑中推出自动化套件
summary: SAP has unveiled its new "Autonomous Enterprise" platform at this year's SAP Sapphire conference, expanding its push into AI agents across business operations. SAP CEO Christian Klein joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Deutsche Bank, Nasdaq Back Elliptic in $120M Round
title_cn: 德意志银行、纳斯达克以 1.2 亿美元融资回馈 Elliptic
summary: Simone Maini, CEO of Elliptic, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Blockchain analytics firm Elliptic Enterprises has raised $120 million in a new funding round backed by Deutsche Bank AG and Nasdaq Inc.’s venture arm, as large financial institutions expand their digital-asset offerings.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Structure Bill Will Make US More Competitive: Calvert
title_cn: 结构法案将使美国更具竞争力：卡尔弗特
summary: Kara Calvert, vice president of US policy at Coinbase, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Senate Banking Committee released market structure bill text that will serve as the basis for the committee’s markup of the digital asset market Clarity Act. The committee meets this Thursday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What's Inside the Digital Asset Structure Bill
title_cn: 数字资产结构法案的内容
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Nathan Dean joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Senate Banking Committee released market structure bill text that will serve as the basis for the committee’s markup of the digital asset market Clarity Act. The committee meets this Thursday.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Debuts Android ‘Googlebook’ Laptop Platform, Reentering Hot Market
title_cn: 谷歌推出Android“Googlebook”笔记本电脑平台，重新进入热门市场
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google introduced a new high-end laptop segment called "Googlebook" that will run Android and prominently showcase Gemini artificial intelligence. Hardware partners Dell Technologies Inc., Lenovo Group Ltd. and HP Inc. will debut models built on the platform in the coming months.

title: Google Unveils New Android AI Features Ahead of Apple’s Siri Revamp
title_cn: 谷歌在苹果 Siri 改进之前推出新的 Android 人工智能功能
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google announced a slew of upcoming features for its Android 17 operating system, showcasing its progress in artificial intelligence weeks before Apple Inc. is set to announce major upgrades to its own iOS platform and AI offerings.

title: Starmer’s Peril Sets Up Stranger-Than-Ever UK King’s Speech
title_cn: 斯塔默的危险让英国国王的演讲变得前所未有的陌生
summary: The King’s Speech is an unusual way to announce government business. Governed by arcane rituals such as the searching of the cellars in Parliament and the capture of a member of the House of Commons to be held as a hostage by the monarchy, the person at the center of it all sits on a gold throne and delivers an agenda he’s had no hand in drafting.

title: FDA's Makary Resigns With Agency in Turmoil
title_cn: FDA 的 Makary 在混乱中辞职
summary: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary resigned, according to President Donald Trump, and Kyle Diamantas will take over the commissioner role in an acting capacity. Rachel Cohrs Zhang reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK’s Starmer Clings On as Rivals Try to Build Coup Momentum
title_cn: 英国斯塔默坚持不懈，对手试图建立政变势头
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer survived in post on Tuesday despite a slew of ministerial resignations which have so far failed to force his downfall.

title: US Solar Makers Allege China Tariff Evasion Through Ethiopia
title_cn: 美国太阳能制造商指控中国通过埃塞俄比亚逃避关税
summary: A group of US solar manufacturers alleged Tuesday that some overseas panel makers are using production in Ethiopia to evade tariffs on Chinese components.

title: China's Secretive Missile Program Is Making Dozens of Companies Rich
title_cn: 中国的秘密导弹计划使数十家公司致富
summary: Beijing appears to have ramped up missile production last year by the most since Xi Jinping became president, according to an analysis that mapped out the sector’s finances for the first time.

title: Trump Faces Emboldened Xi in China | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/12/2026
title_cn: 特朗普在中国面对胆大妄为的习近平|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 12 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Donald Trump's trip to China. On today's show, Democratic Congressman Greg Stanton, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, BGR Group Principal Lester Munson and Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director Sara Schuman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani’s NYC Budget Plan Counts on Taxing Pricey Second Homes
title_cn: 马姆达尼的纽约市预算计划依赖于对昂贵的第二套住房征税
summary: Most New Yorkers will not have to worry about seeing their property tax rates go up soon. But for a small number of those who own luxury second homes in the city, the prospect is still alive.

title: South Carolina Rejects Trump Pressure to Redraw Congress Map
title_cn: 南卡罗来纳州拒绝特朗普重绘国会地图的压力
summary: South Carolina’s Republican-led Senate rejected pressure from President Donald Trump to redraw the state’s congressional districts, a move that would have targeted one of the most senior Black Democrats on Capitol Hill.

title: Inflation Numbers Create Headache for Trump, Republicans
title_cn: 通胀数据让特朗普和共和党人头疼
summary: Voters see rising prices with the midterm elections approaching.

title: Trump’s FDA Commissioner Resigns With Agency in Turmoil
title_cn: 特朗普的 FDA 专员在混乱中辞职
summary: US Food and Drug Administration Commissioner Marty Makary resigned Tuesday, according to President Donald Trump, intensifying the turmoil atop the nation’s health agencies.

title: Lawmakers Query Iran War Cost as Trump Renews Destruction Threat
title_cn: 特朗普再次发出破坏威胁，议员质疑伊朗战争成本
summary: US lawmakers pressed Pentagon chiefs for details on the mounting costs of America’s deadlocked war with Iran, amid signs the conflict is pushing up consumer prices at home too. President Donald Trump said the Islamic Republic will be “decimated” if a deal can’t be reached.

title: Inflation Resurgence Squeezes US Voters as Gas, Food Prices Rise
title_cn: 天然气、食品价格上涨，通胀再度抬头挤压美国选民
summary: The worst US inflation in years is once again eating away at Americans’ paychecks, as rising gasoline and grocery prices threaten to undermine household spending.

title: Makary’s Exit From FDA Gives Biotech Hope ‘Circus’ Is Over
title_cn: Makary 退出 FDA 给生物技术带来希望“马戏”结束
summary: Marty Makary’s exit as head of the Food and Drug Administration is giving the biotech industry hope for stability after months of turmoil.

title: How India’s Modi Has Become More Powerful Than Ever
title_cn: 印度莫迪如何变得比以往任何时候都更强大
summary: A stunning election victory for Narendra Modi’s party shows how he’s consolidating power, even with the economy under pressure.

title: GOP Leaders Mull Gas Tax Suspension as Momentum Grows
title_cn: 随着势头增强，共和党领导人考虑暂停汽油税
summary: Speaker Mike Johnson called suspending the federal gas tax “an intriguing idea” but didn’t commit to a timeline as momentum builds in both chambers to take action.

title: Trump Heads To China As Tensions Rise Over Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争紧张局势升级，特朗普前往中国
summary:
Donald Trump is expecting economic deals and a “wild” welcome this week in China. In reality, he’ll arrive facing an emboldened Xi Jinping, just as his own hand is constrained by the conflict in Iran. 
When the US president touches down in Beijing on Wednesday evening for a 36-hour summit, it’ll mark his first overseas trip since waging war in the Middle East. Over talks at the Great Hall of the People and a state dinner, followed by morning tea, the leaders will discuss trade, tariffs and the self-ruled island of Taiwan. Another agenda item, of course, is Iran.  Sara Schuman, Managing Director at Beacon Global Strategies and former Senior Trade Representative for China at the Office of the United States Trade Representative joins Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Trade Not Iran Will Be Priority in Summit With Xi (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普表示与习近平的峰会将优先考虑贸易而非伊朗（问答）
summary:
US President Donald Trump said he would prioritize trade discussions during his summit with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, and downplayed the amount of attention they would devote to the Iran war.
“We’re going to be talking to President Xi about a lot of things. I would say, more than anything, trade,” Trump told reporters Tuesday at the White House as he departed for the highly anticipated meeting in Beijing.
“We have a lot of things to discuss. I wouldn’t say Iran is one of them, to be honest with you, because we have Iran very much under control,” he added. “We’re either going to make a deal or they’re going to be decimated one way or the other.” He spoke to reporters at the White House.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Seeks UN Support to Break Iran’s Hormuz Chokehold
title_cn: 美国寻求联合国支持以打破伊朗对霍尔木兹的封锁
summary: The US and its allies are pushing a draft United Nations Security Council resolution that would open the door to sanctions or even military action if Iran doesn’t ease its chokehold over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: The Iran War is a 'War of Choice' Says Rep. Stanton
title_cn: 众议员斯坦顿表示，伊朗战争是一场“选择之战”
summary: Democratic Representative Greg Stanton joined Balance of Power to discuss the upcoming trip to China and the Iran War. He also said President Trump arrival in the China with the US in a weakened position to seek Beijing's help in pressuring Iran to resolve the war. Trump is expecting economic deals and a “wild” welcome this week in China. In reality, he’ll arrive facing an emboldened Xi Jinping, just as his own hand is constrained by the conflict in Iran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mamdani Scraps Property Tax Hike, Counts Second-Home Revenue
title_cn: 马姆达尼放弃提高财产税，计算第二套住房收入
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has ditched his plan to raise New Yorkers’ property taxes — an unpopular measure he threatened to use to help close a two-year deficit.

title: Trump Says He's Going to Have a 'Great' Meeting With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普称他将与习近平进行“精彩”会面
summary: President Donald Trump says he's going to have a great meeting with China's Xi Jinping. “My relationship with President Xi is a fantastic one. We’ve always gotten along and we’re doing very well with China, and working with China has been very good, so we look forward to it,” Trump said as he was leaving the White House for Beijing.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Trade, Not Iran, Will Be Priority in Summit With Xi
title_cn: 特朗普表示与习近平的峰会将优先考虑贸易而不是伊朗
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would prioritize trade discussions during his summit with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, and downplayed the amount of attention they would devote to the Iran war.

title: Trump’s Golden Dome Shield to Cost $1.2 Trillion, Watchdog Says
title_cn: 看门狗称，特朗普的金顶盾牌将耗资 1.2 万亿美元
summary: President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome missile-defense shield will cost as much as $1.2 trillion to deploy and operate, six times above current forecasts, according to a new estimate — and would still likely fail to stop an all-out attack.

title: Warsh Confirmed to Fed Board, Still Awaiting Vote on Chair Post
title_cn: 沃什已被任命为美联储董事会成员，但仍在等待主席职位的投票
summary: The Senate confirmed Kevin Warsh’s nomination to the Federal Reserve Board of Governors Tuesday, with the chamber expected to confirm him separately as chair later this week.

title: Trump Expected to Face Emboldened Xi in Beijing
title_cn: 特朗普预计将在北京面对胆大妄为的习近平
summary:
President Donald Trump will be the first US leader in almost a decade to visit China when he lands in Beijing on Wednesday. His much-anticipated summit with President Xi Jinping — delayed from March due to the Iran war — offers the leaders of the world’s two largest economies a chance to reset personal ties and look for common ground on trade, technology and a range of other contentious topics.

Henrietta Treyz, Director of Economic Policy at Veda Partners, joins Bloomberg Intelligence to preview the high-profile meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lawmakers Press Hegseth Over War Costs With Iran Truce Fragile
title_cn: 立法者就伊朗休战脆弱的战争成本向赫格斯施压
summary: Lawmakers with oversight of Pentagon spending pressed Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth over the growing costs of the Iran war, as President Donald Trump suggested a fragile ceasefire with Tehran could break down.
